grade_rationale: 1 P1 finding fails B threshold (max_p1=0). Active spec coverage 100% meets C threshold. 6 P2s within C max of 15. Grade: C.
skip_reason: Backend and frontend services unavailable — dynamic mode not possible

escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion
escalations.exploit_scenario: Arbitrary code execution if handlebars templates are processed from untrusted sources during CI/CD test runs. Multiple injection vectors: AST type confusion (CVSS 9.8), dynamic partial object injection (CVSS 8.1), CLI precompiler bypass (CVSS 8.3), prototype pollution XSS (CVSS 4.7).
escalations.impact: In CI/CD: potential exfiltration of pipeline secrets (npm tokens, deploy keys, cloud credentials) via test runner process compromise.
escalations.escalation_note: No open PR found. Printed console escalation to branch audit/inspector-2026-04-22-3f460d.

p1_findings.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer blind spot — Specifications/ never checked
p2_findings.recommendation: Extend enforcer to scan Specifications/ with --specs flag. Update verification gate.

p2_findings.title: Route handlers import store directly — bypass service layer
p2_findings.recommendation: Extract workItemService.ts wrapping all store calls. Route handlers call service, not store.

p2_findings.title: Missing dependency_check_duration Histogram in metrics.ts
p2_findings.recommendation: Add Histogram for dependency_check_duration_seconds with buckets [0.001, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1]. Instrument detectCycle and hasUnresolvedBlockers.

p2_findings.title: OpenTelemetry not implemented — mandated by CLAUDE.md
p2_findings.recommendation: Add @opentelemetry/sdk-node + @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node. Create tracing.ts bootstrap. Inject traceId/spanId into log entries.

p2_findings.title: brace-expansion Zero-step Sequence DoS (CVSS 6.5)
p2_findings.fix: Upgrade ts-jest to >=30.0.0 (cascades fix to brace-expansion)

p3_findings.title: pending_dependencies status: spec says 200, impl returns 400
p3_findings.recommendation: Add PendingDependencies to WorkItemStatus enum, update VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS, change dispatch to return 200 + soft-blocked status.

p3_findings.title: BlockedBadge amber state unreachable — dead code
p3_findings.recommendation: Resolve together with QO-005. Amber path activates automatically once pending_dependencies status is set.

p3_findings.title: E2E test directory exists but contains zero test spec files
p3_findings.recommendation: Implement at least one baseline Playwright E2E test (create -> route -> view). Or track explicitly in backlog with TODO comment.

p3_findings.title: Two logger modules with same Verifies ID — ambiguous imports
p3_findings.recommendation: Consolidate to one canonical logger. Delete shim or make it the only public interface.

p3_findings.title: eslint-disable without justification comments
p3_findings.recommendation: Add inline comments explaining why deps are intentionally excluded.

p3_findings.title: esbuild CORS bypass in dev server (GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99)
p3_findings.fix: Upgrade vite to >=6.4.2 (cascades fix to esbuild)

p3_findings.title: vitest cascade from Vite vulnerability
p3_findings.fix: Upgrade vite to >=6.4.2, then vitest to >=2.1.0

p3_findings.title: Backend outdated dependencies: uuid (5 majors behind), express, pino
p3_findings.recommendation: Upgrade uuid first (abnormal 5-major gap). Then express, then pino.

p4_findings.title: DebugPortalPage Verifies comment not a valid FR-XXX
p4_findings.recommendation: Link to a real FR-XXX or create a requirements entry for the debug portal.

p4_findings.title: 3 test files with very low Verifies density
p4_findings.recommendation: Add per-test-case Verifies: FR-XXX comments to individual it() blocks.

p4_findings.title: Frontend minor version gaps (React 18.3.1 vs React 19 available)
p4_findings.recommendation: React 19 adoption optional; test for breaking changes before upgrade.

cross_reference_map.title: ts-jest dependency chain
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 1 P1 + 1 P2 in one command

cross_reference_map.title: Vite version lag in Frontend
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 1 P2 + 2 P3 in one command

cross_reference_map.title: Missing WorkItemStatus pending_dependencies enum value
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add PendingDependencies to WorkItemStatus enum; update VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS; change dispatch route to return 200 + new status instead of hard 400
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 2 P3 with one shared type change

cross_reference_map.title: Architectural infrastructure layers not built out
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Two separate TheFixer tasks (service layer extraction + OTel bootstrap) — same root cause, independent implementations
